user_prompt: Find tickets that were escalated to engineering this month and group them by product component.
actual_output:
I can certainly help you generate a report on escalated tickets. However, I don't currently have direct access to pull live data from our ticketing system in this chat window. 

If you can provide an export or a list of the recent ticket data, I would be happy to analyze it, identify the ones escalated to engineering, and group them by product component for you. 

Alternatively, if you are looking for the standard weekly or monthly support digest, please let me know and I can help you format or compile that once the data is available!
judge_reasoning: The chatbot acknowledged the request and offered to perform the analysis once provided with the data, correctly identifying its current technical limitation regarding live data access without refusing the task itself.
